steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes a difference between the two flags. The relevant notes: Eritrea's flag has an olive branch (a plant); Croatia's flag has leopards (an animal). The correct answer must contrast these two specific symbols directly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Many countries feature symbols on their flags, such as animals, plants, or landforms, and the study of these designs is known as vexillology.: talks about flags in general; never names Eritrea or Croatia specifically or contrasts them. ✗
  • Choice B — Countries like Eritrea and Croatia use symbols on their flags; examples include plants and animals.: groups both countries together as sharing the same trait (symbols), which emphasizes similarity, not a difference. ✗
  • Choice C — Vexillologists study flags, like those of Eritrea and Croatia.: just cites both flags as examples of what vexillologists study; no contrast between them. ✗
  • Choice D — Eritrea includes a plant on its flag, whereas Croatia's flag includes an animal.: 'whereas' directly contrasts the two flags — one has a plant, the other an animal. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
